headline: Best Buy’s 6.1% Dividend Yield and 22-Year Streak Look Safe, but Here’s the Risk
summary: Best Buy (NYSE: BBY) has raised its dividend for 22 consecutive years, and the stock now yields 6.1% at a price of $61.71. Is this yield a genuine opportunity, or is the market pricing in trouble ahead? Metric Value Annual Dividend $3.84 per share Dividend Yield 6.1% Consecutive Years of Increases 22 years Most Recent ...
